chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَحْرُمُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ مِمَّا نَكَحَ ابْنُهُ وَ أَبُوهُ وَ مَا يَحِلُّ لَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – What is Prohibited upon the man, from what his son and his father can marry, and what is Permissible for him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/172)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/172)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ لَهُ الْجَارِيَةُ فَيُقَبِّلُهَا هَلْ تَحِلُّ لِوَلَدِهِ قَالَ بِشَهْوَةٍ قُلْتُ نَعَمْ قَالَ فَقَالَ مَا تَرَكَ شَيْئاً إِذَا قَبَّلَهَا بِشَهْوَةٍ ثُمَّ قَالَ ابْتِدَاءً مِنْهُ إِنْ جَرَّدَهَا وَ نَظَرَ إِلَيْهَا بِشَهْوَةٍ حَرُمَتْ عَلَى أَبِيهِ وَ ابْنِهِ قُلْتُ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى جَسَدِهَا فَقَالَ إِذَا نَظَرَ إِلَى فَرْجِهَا وَ جَسَدِهَا بِشَهْوَةٍ حَرُمَتْ عَلَيْهِ.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail who said,

‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> about the man who happened to have the slave girl, so he kissed her. Would she be Permissible for his father?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘With lust?’ I said, ‘Yes’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He has not left anything when he kissed her with lust’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said initiating him: ‘If he exposed her and looked at her with lust, so she is Prohibited unto his father and his son’. I said, ‘When he looked at her body?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When he looked at her private part, and her body with lust, she would be prohibited unto him (father and son)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ‘Isma’il who has said the following: “I once asked al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who had a slave-girl and he kissed her; if she was lawful for his sons. He (the Imam) asked, ‘Was it with lust?’ I replied, ‘Yes, it was with lust.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘He then has left nothing if he has kissed with lust.’ He (the Imam) then initiating said, ‘If he makes her bare and looks at her with lust she becomes unlawful to marry for his father and his son.’ I then asked, ‘What happens if he looks at her body?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘If he looks at her vagina and body with lust she becomes unlawful for him.’”
